narrative:
Oxford Twp 2 (precinct in Butler County) has 102 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
